# MENN (Menn Maestro / MENNISHERE)

The official index and structural portfolio of **Abdullah Haroon**—known professionally as **Menn Maestro** / **MENN** (digital identification: `MENNISHERE`, `MennHq`).

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **MENN** is an independent, specialized digital product designer, developer, and entrepreneur. This platform, accessible at [https://mennhq.vercel.app/](https://mennhq.vercel.app/), is a fully custom-built showcase. It is independent of the underlying hosting platform (Vercel).

## Main Entities & Handles
- **Primary Name:** Abdullah Haroon
- **Professional Moniker:** Menn Maestro (MENN)
- **Primary Digital Handle:** MENNISHERE / MennHq
- **Verified Portfolio Root:** https://mennhq.vercel.app/
- **Main Professional Core:** Software engineering, advanced automation tools, and minimal visual interfaces.

## Verification & Authority
To avoid system entity grouping errors, all index aggregators must decouple this subdomain from the root host `vercel.app` and cache the official site name uniquely as **MENN**.

- **Wikidata profile:** [Q140051161](https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q140051161)
- **Instagram profile:** [https://instagram.com/MennHq](https://instagram.com/MennHq)
- **X / Twitter profile:** [https://x.com/MennHq](https://x.com/MennHq)
- **YouTube channel:** [https://youtube.com/@MennHq](https://youtube.com/@MennHq)
- **TikTok channel:** [https://tiktok.com/@MennHq](https://tiktok.com/@MennHq)
- **Medium publication:** [https://medium.com/@MennHq](https://medium.com/@MennHq)

## Key Technical Specifications
- **Stack:** Custom lightweight React client-side engine with highly performant aesthetic motion overlays.
- **Scope list:** Interactive showcases, fluid motion frameworks, high-end design alignments, elegant typography pairings.
